summary: Phase 3 smoke tests: Backend jobs/real, roadmap/generate, resume/compare all pass. Whisper transcribe endpoint returns 500 due to str path passed to OpenAISpeechToText (needs bytes/PathLike/file object). Frontend Dashboard, /roadmap, /compare, /jobs (both tabs, Apply on Remotive link verified), /interview (mic button appears after Start, click handled gracefully with mic-denied toast, no crash) all render with correct data-testids.
passed: POST /api/roadmap/generate -> 200, phases=4, gap_analysis, long_term_vision, monthly_habits=10, certifications=7, current_position + target_position
POST /api/resume/compare -> 200, keys: resume_a_score=72, resume_b_score=68, winner=A, verdict, strengths/weaknesses/recommendation/best_of_both all present
Dashboard: card-roadmap, card-compare, nav-roadmap, nav-compare all present
/jobs: jobs-tab-real (default) + jobs-tab-ai present; clicking Find matches -> job-apply-0 link points to remotive.com
/interview: iv-mic appears after Start Interview; clicking it in headless (no mic perm) shows 'Microphone permission denied' toast — no crash, no console error

failed.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error. Root cause: server.py line 526 calls `stt.transcribe(file=tmp_path, ...)` passing a str path. litellm/OpenAI SDK error: 'Expected entry at `file` to be bytes, an io.IOBase instance, PathLike or a tuple but received <class \'str\'>'.
failed.evidence: curl -F 'file=@/tmp/tone.wav' /api/interview/transcribe -> HTTP 500. Backend log: emergentintegrations/llm/openai/speech_to_text.py:192 raises 'Failed to transcribe audio: litellm.APIConnectionError: ... received <class str> instead.'

action_items: Fix /api/interview/transcribe in /app/backend/server.py line 526: wrap tmp_path so a file object or pathlib.Path is passed instead of str. E.g. `open(tmp_path, 'rb')` or `pathlib.Path(tmp_path)` depending on what OpenAISpeechToText.transcribe expects. Voice interview UI button works but calls will 500 until this is fixed.

notes.regression_signals: History/rewrites, /interview/start, /interview/submit, /skills/analyze all 200 in backend logs during smoke — no regressions observed
